/usr/bin/arm-linux-gnueabihf-gcc --sysroot=/src/.snesmini/sysroot -O3 -U_TIME_BITS -D_TIME_BITS=32 -isystem /usr/include -g -L/src/.snesmini/sysroot/usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf -L/src/.snesmini/sysroot/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf -Wl,-rpath-link,/src/.snesmini/sysroot/usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf:/src/.snesmini/sysroot/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf -static-libstdc++ -static-libgcc CMakeFiles/bmsx_libretro_host.dir/platform/libretro_host/main.c.o -o bmsx_libretro_host  -ldl -lrt
